data.description:
## Summary
Switch the rebar Gerrit project submit type from `merge if necessary` to **Fast Forward Only** so a change is submittable only when built on the current `main` tip. When main advances, the change goes non-submittable until rebased/re-merged onto the tip; that rebase drops the Verified vote (copyCondition excludes TRIVIAL_REBASE) and re-runs CI on the exact tree that lands — closing the stale-base-merge gap (R5). Path C from the merge-queue design; Zuul ruled out on cost.

## What
- `infra/gerrit/project.config`: `[submit] action = fast forward only` (+ corrected comment)
- `docs/adr/0040-main-fast-forward-only-submit.md` (amends ADR-0020/0025; corrects ADR-0025's FFO claim)
- Agent-facing landing semantics in CLAUDE.md + CONTRIBUTING.md (rebase-to-tip to submit)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Submit type is Fast Forward Only in project.config; config-check passes
- [ ] ADR-0040 documents R5 mechanism + corrects ADR-0025 + records R4 treadmill tradeoff
- [ ] CLAUDE.md/CONTRIBUTING.md tell agents a change must be on current main tip to submit
- [ ] Feature-branch --no-ff merge-back remains compatible (verified via Gerrit docs)
- [ ] Operator apply step (setup-project.sh) flagged; refs/meta/config is detect-only
data.title: Adopt Fast Forward Only submit type on main (ADR-0040) — no stale/untested tree can land (R5)
